10470925.name: BROWN GRAIN DERBY SHOES
10470925.description:
BROWN GRAIN DERBY SHOES - premium leather dress shoes crafted for the modern gentleman.

Key features:
• Brown leather upper with polished finish.
• Clean formal stitching with timeless profile.
• Open-lace Derby construction for flexible fit.
• Comfortable leather lining with durable outsole.
• Ideal for office, weddings, and formal occasions.

Fit & styling: Wear with suits, formal trousers, and blazers for business, ceremonies, and polished everyday style.

Care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Use leather conditioner periodically. Store with shoe trees to maintain shape.

Available sizes EU 40-46. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

53634919.name: BLACK PATENT STRAP FORMAL LOAFERS
53634919.description:
Black patent-strap formal loafers with textured vamp and gold-tone buckle accent.

Key features:
• Black leather upper with polished finish.
• Slip-on loafer construction with refined strap detail.
• Low-profile dress sole with modest heel.
• Comfortable leather lining with durable outsole.
• Ideal for office, weddings, and formal occasions.
